name: Primis Financial Corp.
summary: PARTI Overview Primis Financial Corp. is the bank holding company for Primis Bank, a Virginia state-chartered bank which commenced operations on April 14, 2005. Primis Bank provides a range of financial services to individuals and small and medium-sized businesses. As of December31, 2025, Primis had $4.0 billion in total assets, $3.3 billion in total loans held for investment, $3.4 billion in total deposits and $423 million in total stockholders equity.
